project.title: Protein profile of exosome derived from giant panda adipose-derived mesenchymal stem cells
project.projectDescription: Exosomes were extracted from adipose mesenchymal stem cells of Qnling giant pandas using ultracentrifugation. Proteomic techniques were applied to analyze the composition and function of ADMSC-EX.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: ADMSCs of Qinling giant panda of 3-7 generations were cultured to extract exosomes. When the cells reached approximately 80% confluence, add the exosome-free serum medium then culture in cell incubator for 48 h. Exosomes were separated by ultrafast centrifugation and stored at -80°C for a subsequent test.Total proteins were isolated from exosomes using total protein extraction kit (keygentec, Jiangsu, China)
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The resulting exosomes were sequenced by proteomic sequencing at Novo Zhiyuan Biotechnology for original data and subsequent analysis at Gallusgallus uniprot_2021 7 15. fasta. Fasta (3430g seguences).

mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifier PXD059496.
